description: Banduwathie Punyadeera Nee Bandu Mamuhewa Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Habaraduwa and Others Banduwathie Punyadeera Nee Bandu Mamuhewa Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Habaraduwa and Others View More before Hon. Dr.D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Banduwathie Punyadeera Nee Bandu Mamuhewa Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Habaraduwa and Others Banduwathie Punyadeera Nee Bandu Mamuhewa Vs. The Divisional Secretary of Habaraduwa and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr.D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner sought a divesture of a land acquired by the Government of which she is claiming that she is entitled to a certain share of the title. The divesture is sought in respect of the unutilised land. Application refused on the basis that the Petitioner failed to relate the title to the entirety of the property and there are other claimants to the title as well; in addition to that, the line ministry has not given consent to divest the vested property to the line ministry.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
